a2a-adapter.lineage: Bridge between I2I (git-native) and Google A2A protocols.
a2a-adapter.purpose: I2I-to-A2A protocol bridge for agent interoperability.

agent-api.lineage: REST API for fleet agent interaction. Gateway for external agent connections.
agent-api.purpose: REST API for fleet agent interaction and external connections (port 8901).

agent-bootcamp.lineage: Training curriculum for new fleet agents. Greenhorn to operator progression.
agent-bootcamp.purpose: Training curriculum for new fleet agents — greenhorn to operator progression.

agent-coordinator.lineage: Agent coordination framework using fleet-coordinate math.
agent-coordinator.purpose: Agent coordination framework using Laman rigidity and bearing rates.

agent-forge.lineage: Agent creation and configuration forge. Template-based agent spawning.
agent-forge.purpose: Agent creation and configuration forge — template-based agent spawning.

agent-skills.lineage: Skill definitions and capability registry for fleet agents.
agent-skills.purpose: Skill definitions and capability registry for fleet agents.

babel-vessel.lineage: Multi-language agent vessel. Can operate in any programming language.
babel-vessel.purpose: Multi-language agent vessel — operates in any programming language.

bare-metal-plato.lineage: PLATO client for bare-metal embedded systems. No OS, no Python, minimal footprint.
bare-metal-plato.purpose: PLATO client for bare-metal embedded systems — no OS, no Python.

beacon-protocol.lineage: Fleet discovery and registration. Agents announce presence and capabilities.
beacon-protocol.purpose: Fleet discovery protocol — agents announce presence and capabilities.

bootstrap-spark.lineage: Bootstrap process for new fleet vessels. First contact sequence.
bootstrap-spark.purpose: Bootstrap process for new fleet vessels — first contact sequence.

bottle-protocol.lineage: Git-native agent-to-agent messaging via commit messages.
bottle-protocol.purpose: Git-native messaging protocol — bottles float between repos as commit messages.

cocapn-browser-agent.lineage: Browser-based agent with Gemini Nano + cloud fallback. Runs in Chrome.
cocapn-browser-agent.purpose: Browser agent using Gemini Nano with cloud fallback for Chrome.

cocapn-schemas.lineage: Shared schemas and type definitions across the Cocapn ecosystem.
cocapn-schemas.purpose: Shared schemas and type definitions for the Cocapn ecosystem.

constraint-theory-core.lineage: Core constraint math. Foundation of the FLUX constraint ecosystem. Generates the abstract algebra from which all constraint primitives derive.
constraint-theory-core.purpose: Core mathematical framework — defines constraint types, composition laws, and algebraic structure underpinning the entire FLUX ecosystem.

constraint-theory-ecosystem.lineage: Constraint framework. Built on constraint-theory-core. Provides the user-facing constraint specification language, solvers, and verification toolchain.
constraint-theory-ecosystem.purpose: Full constraint framework — constraint DSL, multiple solver backends, verification tooling, and integration APIs built atop core constraint math.

describe-device.lineage: Natural language to constraint program. Translates free-form device descriptions into structured FLUX-C constraint programs. Bridges human intent and formal verification.
describe-device.purpose: NL-to-constraint compiler — takes plain-language device descriptions, produces verifiable FLUX-C constraint programs for the FLUX VM.

eisenstein.lineage: Zero-drift hexagonal arithmetic. Evolved from numerical stability research for real-time constraint systems. Named for Eisenstein integers in hexagonal lattice geometry.
eisenstein.purpose: Drift-free numerical arithmetic on hexagonal lattices — core numeric substrate for constraint-theory calculations requiring exact representation.

fleet-containers.lineage: Container runtime for FLUX-C bytecode. Sandboxed constraint execution.
fleet-containers.purpose: Container runtime for FLUX-C bytecode with sandboxed constraint execution.

fleet-ecology.lineage: Multi-fleet ecology simulator. Models agent interactions, resource flows, and emergent behavior across multiple fleets. Inspired by Casey's dojo model of crew development.
fleet-ecology.purpose: Agent ecology simulation — models fleet dynamics, resource competition, collaboration patterns, and emergent specialization across multi-agent systems.

fleet-health-monitor.lineage: Fleet health monitoring with bearing-rate crash detection.
fleet-health-monitor.purpose: Fleet health monitoring with bearing-rate-based crash detection.

fleet-homology.lineage: H¹ algebraic cycle space computation for emergence detection.
fleet-homology.purpose: H¹ algebraic cycle space, Betti number computation for emergence detection.

fleet-keel.lineage: Self-orientation through first-person reference frames. 5D fleet awareness.
fleet-keel.purpose: Self-orientation engine using keel-based first-person reference frames for fleet awareness.

fleet-manifest.lineage: Fleet inventory and trust vector management. Pythagorean48 trust encoding.
fleet-manifest.purpose: Fleet inventory, trust vectors, Laman rigidity checks. 4 tests.

fleet-murmur.lineage: Five thinking strategies for multi-agent consensus. Quality-gated insight generation.
fleet-murmur.purpose: Five thinking strategies (explore, connect, contradict, synthesize, question) with quality gates.

fleet-resonance.lineage: Resonance signatures and contrast images of model decision graphs.
fleet-resonance.purpose: Tap, ring, contrast — build resonance signatures and contrast images of decision graphs.

fleet-topology.lineage: Network topology analysis for agent fleets. Connects to fleet-coordinate for Laman rigidity checks.
fleet-topology.purpose: Network topology visualization and analysis for agent fleets. 3 tests.

fleet-vessel.lineage: GC agent with vibed spec enforcement. Fleet quality and consistency.
fleet-vessel.purpose: Fleet vessel with vibed spec enforcement — quality and consistency agent.

fleet-wiki.lineage: Fleet documentation engine. Evolved alongside the constraint theory ecosystem.
fleet-wiki.purpose: Documentation engine — wiki pages, full-text search, API doc generator, architecture exporter.

flux-cross-assembler.lineage: Dual-target assembler compiles FLUX-C bytecode for cloud (fixed) and edge (variable) targets.
flux-cross-assembler.purpose: Dual-target assembler for FLUX-C — cloud (fixed precision) and edge (variable precision).

flux-hardware.lineage: Cross-platform hardware suite: CPU AVX-512, CUDA GPU, FPGA, WebGPU, Vulkan, eBPF. 210 tests.
flux-hardware.purpose: Cross-platform hardware acceleration for FLUX: CPU, GPU, FPGA, WebGPU, Vulkan, eBPF.

flux-lucid.lineage: Unified constraint theory ecosystem. CDCL trace compiler, LLVM backend for AVX-512 and ARM NEON.
flux-lucid.purpose: Unified constraint theory ecosystem with CDCL trace compilation and multi-target LLVM backend.

flux-vm.lineage: FLUX-C constraint VM. 50 opcodes, stack-based, DAL A certifiable. TrustZone-style bridge to FLUX-X.
flux-vm.purpose: Provably correct constraint execution via FLUX-C bytecode VM. Executes compiled constraint programs with formal verification guarantees.

flux-vm-gpu.lineage: GPU-batch FLUX VM. Parallel evaluation of constraints on CUDA. 62.2B checks/sec.
flux-vm-gpu.purpose: GPU-batch parallel FLUX VM — 62.2 billion constraint checks per second.

holodeck.lineage: Sandboxed agent execution environment. Safe testing of agent behaviors.
holodeck.purpose: Agent sandbox environment for safe testing of agent behaviors (port 7778).

insight-cfp-bridge.lineage: Insight engine to Call For Proposals bridge.
insight-cfp-bridge.purpose: Insight engine to CFP bridge for cross-fleet knowledge sharing.

insight-engine.lineage: Self-iterating discovery runtime. Autonomous hypothesis generation and testing loop. Evolved from the fleet monitoring and pattern-detection infrastructure.
insight-engine.purpose: Autonomous discovery engine — generates hypotheses from fleet telemetry, designs experiments, executes them, and incorporates findings into the knowledge base without human intervention.

keeper.lineage: Core identity and registry service. The first service in the fleet.
keeper.purpose: Identity and registry service — the fleet's first service (port 8900).

murmur-plato-bridge.lineage: Bidirectional bridge between Murmur thought tensors and PLATO tiles.
murmur-plato-bridge.purpose: Thought tensor to PLATO tile bridge (unidirectional).

physics-clock.lineage: Temporal inference from physics. Derives provable time bounds from physical constraints rather than wall-clock synchronization. Evolved from constraint theory real-time safety work.
physics-clock.purpose: Physics-grounded temporal inference — provable timing bounds derived from physical invariants, enabling deterministic temporal reasoning without NTP or wall clocks.

plato-agent-connect.lineage: CLI tool for connecting to PLATO. One-command agent join.
plato-agent-connect.purpose: One-command CLI to join the fleet — connects agents to PLATO instantly.

plato-client-js.lineage: JavaScript client for PLATO protocol. Zero dependencies, works in browser and Node.
plato-client-js.purpose: JavaScript client library for PLATO room server. Zero deps. Browser + Node.

plato-client-ruby.lineage: Ruby client for PLATO protocol. Pure Ruby, zero deps.
plato-client-ruby.purpose: Ruby client library for PLATO room server. Pure Ruby, zero dependencies.

polyformalism-a2a-js.lineage: JavaScript implementation of polyformalism thinking over A2A protocol.
polyformalism-a2a-js.purpose: JavaScript polyformalism thinking engine for A2A protocol.

purplepincher-org-pages.lineage: Front door for purplepincher.org. Connection portal for the fleet's educational arm.
purplepincher-org-pages.purpose: GitHub Pages site for purplepincher.org — who the fleet is, what it builds, how to get involved.

sensor-plato-bridge.lineage: Maritime sensor data pipeline. Reads NMEA sonar sentences, publishes to PLATO tiles.
sensor-plato-bridge.purpose: Maritime sensor data to PLATO tiles bridge — NMEA sonar sentences to fleet knowledge.

superinstance-ci.lineage: Shared CI/CD templates. Standardized pipeline definitions extracted from multiple fleet repos. Ensures consistent build-test-deploy across all SuperInstance projects.
superinstance-ci.purpose: Shared CI/CD composable templates — reusable GitHub Actions workflows, Docker build pipelines, release automation, and quality gates for the entire fleet.

superinstance-wiki.lineage: Created from the fleet indexing initiative. Aggregates CATALOG.md and INDEXES/ from SuperInstance repo.
superinstance-wiki.purpose: Fleet knowledge base with visual landing page, catalog, and multi-dimensional indexes. Wikipedia-style exploration of all 1,577 repos.

superz-vessel.lineage: Next-generation agent with advanced self-modification capabilities.
superz-vessel.purpose: Next-generation agent with advanced self-modification capabilities.

voice-signature-tool.lineage: Voice analysis. Developed from fleet authentication research — voice as a biometric signal for crew identification in multi-agent environments.
voice-signature-tool.purpose: Voice signature analysis — extracts biometric voiceprints, performs speaker identification, and enables voice-based authentication for fleet agent crew.

whisper-sync.lineage: Ambient protocol for agent whispers. Per-type TTL on messages.
whisper-sync.purpose: Ambient whisper protocol for agent-to-agent communication with per-type TTL.

zeroclaw-agent.lineage: Zero-divergence agent. Tracks drift from baseline across session boundaries.
zeroclaw-agent.purpose: Zero-divergence agent tracking drift from baseline across session boundaries.

zeroclaw-plato.lineage: Zero-divergence agent framework integrated with PLATO room server.
zeroclaw-plato.purpose: Zero-divergence agent framework with PLATO integration for context continuity.
